name: vibe-ai-agent
description: Ultimate Free AI Platform - Vibe Coding with Plain English

scripts.build: npm run copy-files && npm run build-android
scripts.copy-files: mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/ && cp styles.css www/ && cp app.js www/ && cp manifest.json www/ && cp sw.js www/ && cp icon-*.png www/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init 'Vibe AI Agent' com.vibeai.agent --web-dir www
scripts.build-android: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build-android-release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease

author: Vibe AI
